creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Neubauer from comment #0)

Hi Martin,

thanks for the report and patch! I was a bit surprised at this point because I was able to build games/pysolfc without any problems.

A little later I also received a total of two e-mails from pkg-fallout, which surprised me even more.  So I was curious and did some research:

Commit ports 2ba14de447a2 was the root cause and commit ports 5cd70cb3b790 fixed it.

For the sake of completeness, I wanted to add this for posterity. Thank you at this point for closing the bug with OBE accordingly.
